mapper.sql: FROM card_bill cb LEFT JOIN bank_card bc ON bc.id = cb.card_id AND bc.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN card_user owner_user ON owner_user.id = cb.owner_id AND owner_user.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN card_user top_user ON top_user.id = IFNULL(owner_user.parent_id, owner_user.id) AND top_user.is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT #{query.year} AS year, #{query.month} AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT IFNULL(top_user.id, owner_user.id)) AS user_count, COUNT(DISTINCT cb.card_id) AS card_count, COALESCE(SUM(cb.bill_amount), 0) AS total_bill_amount, COALESCE(SUM(cb.fee_amount), 0) AS total_fee_amount, COALESCE(SUM(cb.pos_cost_amount), 0) AS total_pos_cost_amount, COALESCE(SUM(cb.other_fee_amount), 0) AS total_other_fee_amount, COALESCE(SUM(cb.net_profit), 0) AS total_net_profit

SELECT IFNULL(top_user.id, owner_user.id) AS user_id, IFNULL(top_user.name, owner_user.name) AS user_name, COUNT(DISTINCT cb.card_id) AS card_count, COUNT(*) AS bill_count, COUNT(DISTINCT cb.bill_month) AS bill_month_count, COALESCE(SUM(cb.bill_amount), 0) AS total_bill_amount, COALESCE(AVG(cb.fee_rate), 0) AS avg_fee_rate, COALESCE(SUM(cb.fee_amount), 0) AS total_fee_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cb.fee_paid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS fee_paid_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cb.fee_paid = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END), 0) AS fee_unpaid_count, COALESCE(SUM(cb.pos_cost_amount), 0) AS total_pos_cost_amount, COALESCE(SUM(cb.other_fee_amount), 0) AS total_other_fee_amount, COALESCE(SUM(cb.net_profit), 0) AS total_net_profit
GROUP BY IFNULL(top_user.id, owner_user.id), IFNULL(top_user.name, owner_user.name) ORDER BY total_net_profit DESC, total_bill_amount DESC, user_id ASC

SELECT cb.card_id, IFNULL(top_user.id, owner_user.id) AS user_id, IFNULL(top_user.name, owner_user.name) AS user_name, owner_user.id AS owner_id, owner_user.name AS owner_name, bc.bank_name, bc.card_no_last4, COUNT(*) AS bill_count, COALESCE(SUM(cb.bill_amount), 0) AS total_bill_amount, COALESCE(AVG(cb.fee_rate), 0) AS avg_fee_rate, COALESCE(SUM(cb.fee_amount), 0) AS total_fee_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cb.fee_paid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS fee_paid_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cb.fee_paid = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END), 0) AS fee_unpaid_count, COALESCE(SUM(cb.pos_cost_amount), 0) AS total_pos_cost_amount, COALESCE(SUM(cb.other_fee_amount), 0) AS total_other_fee_amount, COALESCE(SUM(cb.net_profit), 0) AS total_net_profit
GROUP BY cb.card_id, IFNULL(top_user.id, owner_user.id), IFNULL(top_user.name, owner_user.name), owner_user.id, owner_user.name, bc.bank_name, bc.card_no_last4 ORDER BY total_net_profit DESC, total_bill_amount DESC, cb.card_id DESC

SELECT cb.bill_month, COUNT(DISTINCT IFNULL(top_user.id, owner_user.id)) AS user_count, COUNT(DISTINCT cb.card_id) AS card_count, COUNT(*) AS bill_count, COALESCE(SUM(cb.bill_amount), 0) AS total_bill_amount, COALESCE(AVG(cb.fee_rate), 0) AS avg_fee_rate, COALESCE(SUM(cb.fee_amount), 0) AS total_fee_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cb.fee_paid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS fee_paid_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN cb.fee_paid = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END), 0) AS fee_unpaid_count, COALESCE(SUM(cb.pos_cost_amount), 0) AS total_pos_cost_amount, COALESCE(SUM(cb.other_fee_amount), 0) AS total_other_fee_amount, COALESCE(SUM(cb.net_profit), 0) AS total_net_profit
GROUP BY cb.bill_month ORDER BY cb.bill_month ASC
